name: Gemini 3 Advanced Code Generator
description: High-quality code generation and refactoring with strict structural and syntax guarantees, derived from Gemini 3 traces.
preconditions: task requires writing or modifying code
target language is specified or implied
postconditions: output is valid, syntactically correct code
all requested edge cases are handled
no conversational filler or markdown wrapping outside requested format
evidence_requirements: contains code blocks with correct language tags

steps.text: Parse requirements and identify edge cases for code generation
Draft code implementation focusing on readability and performance
Self-correct syntax and verify against constraints before output

rollback: if syntax is invalid, fallback to basic prompt
if specifications are contradictory, ask for clarification
